name: Grilled Mustard-Crusted Dolphin
recipeInstructions:
1. Season dolphin with salt and pepper; rub with a little melted butter.
Reserve remaining butter for later use.
2. Over very hot grill (500°F), cook the dolphin fillets until grill marks appear.
Remove from the grill immediately.
3. On each fillet, spread Dijon mustard evenly.
Top with a mixture of reserved butter, bread crumbs, fresh herbs, and mustard seeds.
4. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F until the dolphin is brown on top and moist in the center.
Makes 2 servings.
